things.name: Gyeongbokgung Palace
things.description: The grandest of Seoul's five Joseon Dynasty palaces — changing of the guard ceremony in traditional costume

things.name: N Seoul Tower & Namsan Park
things.description: Iconic tower on Namsan Mountain — cable car up, love padlocks and panoramic views of Seoul

things.name: Bukchon Hanok Village
things.description: Maze of narrow alleys lined with 600 traditional Korean hanok houses — the most photogenic neighbourhood

things.name: Myeongdong Shopping & Street Food
things.description: Seoul's most vibrant shopping street with K-beauty, fashion and addictive Korean street food stalls

things.name: Insadong Cultural Street
things.description: Traditional tea houses, art galleries, antique shops and Korean crafts in a pedestrianised quarter

things.name: National Museum of Korea
things.description: The largest museum in Asia with 220,000 artefacts spanning Korean history from prehistory to Joseon

things.name: Dongdaemun Design Plaza (DDP)
things.description: Zaha Hadid's futuristic landmark building — 24-hour fashion market and cutting-edge design exhibitions

things.name: DMZ Demilitarized Zone Tour
things.description: Day trip to the world's most heavily militarised border — JSA, tunnels and Dorasan Station

things.name: Hongdae Night Scene
things.description: Hongik University district — indie music clubs, street performances and Seoul's coolest youth culture

things.name: Korean BBQ Experience
things.description: Cook samgyeopsal (pork belly) and galbi at your table — a must-do Seoul dining experience
